reasoning: The control CP-2 (3) focuses on ensuring that mission and business functions can resume after a disruption. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring high availability and resilience of critical components. 'k8s_etcd_backup_configured' ensures that etcd, the key-value store for Kubernetes, is backed up regularly to recover from data loss. 'k8s_apiserver_high_availability_configured' ensures the API server is configured for high availability, preventing a single point of failure. 'k8s_cluster_autoscaler_enabled' ensures that the cluster can scale automatically to handle increased load, maintaining service availability. 'k8s_pod_disruption_budget_configured' ensures that critical applications have disruption budgets to maintain availability during maintenance or unexpected disruptions.
title: Contingency Plan | Resume Mission and Business Functions
